Models grouped into families. Escape family includes EcoSport, Escape, Escape Hybrid & PHEV. Expedition family includes Expedition, EL & Max.

XC40 class includes XC40, XC40 Recharge & C40 Recharge. XC60 & XC90 classes include all Hybrid/PHEV variants.
